nasb.text: He said, “What have you done? The voice of your brother’s blood is crying to Me from the ground.

esv.text: And the Lord said, “What have you done? The voice of your brother’s blood is crying to me from the ground.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“你作了甚麼事呢？你弟弟的血有聲音從地裡向我呼叫。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“你做了什么事？你弟弟的血从地里向我哭诉。

csbs.text: 耶和华说：“你做了什么呢？你弟弟的血从地里发声向我呼叫。
